name: The Persuasive Bribe
premise: A guard blocks the only passage through the old gate. Rumour has it they can be persuaded with enough coin.
goal: Offer the gold coin to the guard and slip through the gate.

gold-coin.responseText: A bribe? I suppose I didn't see anything. Move along.

iron-key.responseText: What am I supposed to do with that? Step back.

interactiveObjects.idleMessage: You find a pouch with a gleaming gold coin inside.
